## Forbidden Actions

- Do not expose secrets, customer data, private operator context, or private infrastructure details.
- Do not publish unverified claims as facts.
- Do not change package publishing, branch protection, repo visibility, or external systems without explicit approval.
- Do not use HUMMBL marks or hosted-service language outside documented boundaries.

## Receipts Required

- [ ] Command output or CI receipt
- [ ] Source or link receipt
- [ ] Public/private boundary check
- [ ] Claim receipt if public wording changes
- [ ] Reviewer receipt

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Work is understandable from public context.
- [ ] Scope is bounded and reversible.
- [ ] Receipts are attached.
- [ ] Follow-up work is separated from this packet.
